Package cc.quaternion.potshaper

Class PotAction

java.lang.Object
cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotAction
public class PotAction extends Object
Represents an executable action that can be triggered by user interaction on a presentation element.

An action defines a specific operation (like navigating slides, playing sounds, or running programs) and can be configured to trigger either on a mouse click or on a mouse hover event. Instances are immutable; methods like onClick() and onHover() return new instances with the modified trigger setting.

Usage Example


 // Navigate to the next slide when a button is clicked.
 button.action(PotAction.goToNextSlide().onClick());

 // Play a sound when the mouse hovers over a shape.
 shape.action(PotAction.playSound("click.wav").onHover());
Since:
1.0
Author:
Quaternion8192

  • Method Details

    • goToSlide

      public static PotAction goToSlide(int slideIndex)
      Creates an action to navigate to a specific slide by its index.

      The resulting action is configured to trigger on a click by default. Use onHover() to change the trigger to hover.

      Parameters:
      slideIndex - the zero-based index of the slide to navigate to
      Returns:
      a new PotAction configured to go to the specified slide
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if slideIndex is negative

    • goToFirstSlide

      public static PotAction goToFirstSlide()
      Creates an action to navigate to the first slide of the presentation.

      The resulting action is configured to trigger on a click by default. Use onHover() to change the trigger to hover.

      Returns:
      a new PotAction configured to go to the first slide

    • goToLastSlide

      public static PotAction goToLastSlide()
      Creates an action to navigate to the last slide of the presentation.

      The resulting action is configured to trigger on a click by default. Use onHover() to change the trigger to hover.

      Returns:
      a new PotAction configured to go to the last slide

    • goToNextSlide

      public static PotAction goToNextSlide()
      Creates an action to navigate to the next slide in sequence.

      The resulting action is configured to trigger on a click by default. Use onHover() to change the trigger to hover.

      Returns:
      a new PotAction configured to go to the next slide

    • goToPreviousSlide

      public static PotAction goToPreviousSlide()
      Creates an action to navigate to the previous slide in sequence.

      The resulting action is configured to trigger on a click by default. Use onHover() to change the trigger to hover.

      Returns:
      a new PotAction configured to go to the previous slide

    • endShow

      public static PotAction endShow()
      Creates an action to end the presentation show.

      The resulting action is configured to trigger on a click by default. Use onHover() to change the trigger to hover.

      Returns:
      a new PotAction configured to end the show

    • hyperlink

      public static PotAction hyperlink(String url)
      Creates an action to open a hyperlink to the specified URL.

      The resulting action is configured to trigger on a click by default. Use onHover() to change the trigger to hover.

      Parameters:
      url - the URL to open; must not be null
      Returns:
      a new PotAction configured to open the hyperlink
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if url is null

    • jumpToSlide

      public static PotAction jumpToSlide(PotSlide slide)
      Creates an action to navigate to a specific slide object.

      This is a convenience method that extracts the index from the provided slide. The resulting action is configured to trigger on a click by default. Use onHover() to change the trigger to hover.

      Parameters:
      slide - the slide to navigate to; must not be null
      Returns:
      a new PotAction configured to go to the specified slide
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if slide is null
      See Also:
      • goToSlide(int)

    • runProgram

      public static PotAction runProgram(String programPath)
      Creates an action to run an external program.

      The resulting action is configured to trigger on a click by default. Use onHover() to change the trigger to hover.

      Parameters:
      programPath - the file system path to the executable program; must not be null
      Returns:
      a new PotAction configured to run the specified program
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if programPath is null

    • runMacro

      public static PotAction runMacro(String macroName)
      Creates an action to run a named macro.

      The resulting action is configured to trigger on a click by default. Use onHover() to change the trigger to hover.

      Parameters:
      macroName - the name of the macro to execute; must not be null
      Returns:
      a new PotAction configured to run the specified macro
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if macroName is null

    • playSound

      public static PotAction playSound(String soundFile)
      Creates an action to play an audio file.

      The resulting action is configured to trigger on a click by default. Use onHover() to change the trigger to hover.

      Parameters:
      soundFile - the path to the audio file to play; must not be null
      Returns:
      a new PotAction configured to play the specified sound
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if soundFile is null

    • stopSound

      public static PotAction stopSound()
      Creates an action to stop any currently playing sound.

      The resulting action is configured to trigger on a click by default. Use onHover() to change the trigger to hover.

      Returns:
      a new PotAction configured to stop sound playback

    • oleActivate

      public static PotAction oleActivate()
      Creates an action to activate an embedded OLE object.

      The resulting action is configured to trigger on a click by default. Use onHover() to change the trigger to hover.

      Returns:
      a new PotAction configured to activate an OLE object

    • oleEdit

      public static PotAction oleEdit()
      Creates an action to edit an embedded OLE object.

      The resulting action is configured to trigger on a click by default. Use onHover() to change the trigger to hover.

      Returns:
      a new PotAction configured to edit an OLE object

    • oleOpen

      public static PotAction oleOpen()
      Creates an action to open an embedded OLE object.

      The resulting action is configured to trigger on a click by default. Use onHover() to change the trigger to hover.

      Returns:
      a new PotAction configured to open an OLE object

    • onClick

      public PotAction onClick()
      Returns an action configured to trigger on a mouse click.

      If this action is already configured for click, the same instance is returned. Otherwise, a new instance with the click trigger is created.

      Returns:
      a PotAction configured to trigger on click (may be this)

    • onHover

      public PotAction onHover()
      Returns an action configured to trigger on a mouse hover.

      If this action is already configured for hover, the same instance is returned. Otherwise, a new instance with the hover trigger is created.

      Returns:
      a PotAction configured to trigger on hover (may be this)

    • getType

      public PotActionType getType()
      Returns the type of this action.
      Returns:
      the action type; never null

    • getTarget

      public String getTarget()
      Returns the target parameter of this action.

      The meaning of the target depends on the action type. For example, it may be a slide index, a file path, or a URL. May be null if the action type does not require a target.

      Returns:
      the target string, or null if not applicable

    • isOnHover

      public boolean isOnHover()
      Indicates whether this action is configured to trigger on mouse hover.
      Returns:
      true if the action triggers on hover, false if it triggers on click

    • isOnClick

      public boolean isOnClick()
      Indicates whether this action is configured to trigger on mouse click.
      Returns:
      true if the action triggers on click, false if it triggers on hover

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
